description_long: This is a broken ceramic cup with a cylindrical shape, featuring a white base color adorned with green leafy vine patterns and small yellow accents. The cup has a thick, golden-brown rim at the bottom and a matching handle, which is partially detached and missing several pieces. Large, jagged breaks are visible along the rim and body, with several shards lying nearby, indicating significant damage. The interior is smooth and glossy, consistent with glazed ceramic. The decorative pattern is hand-painted, giving the cup a traditional, artisanal appearance. No branding or text is visible on the surface.
description: A broken, white ceramic cup with green vine patterns, a golden-brown base and handle, and several missing pieces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the largest break in the rim, a missing section of the handle, and two large shards on the ground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the broken handle, a large missing section of the rim, and a prominent shard in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intact portion of the cup's body, a small shard nearby, and the continuous vine pattern.
description_view_3: Back view showing the remaining part of the handle, the unbroken section of the rim, and the decorative pattern wrapping around.
